text:
Old kermit ports installed only program files.
This ports also installed documentation files and initialization file in newest version of kermit archive.

( I'm send-pr twice , first pr missing patch file. Sorry --; )

How-To-Repeat: 
Fixed : Makefile , Makefile.sed , distfiles
Removred : dot.kermrc (used in archive)

check it and commit it please.
